name: Elevator Guide Rails
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Guide rail segment TAM ~$3.5-5.4B globally (2024), CAGR 5-6%. ZOLLERN wins 15/23 needs with net weighted delta +342 - strongest coverage profile of all existing markets. All 4 losses are minor (delta=-1). 6 needs with delta >= +4 (major differentiation). Zero knockout constraints.
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Strongest ZOLLERN position. Expand into high-rise and retrofit segments where IT8 tolerance and IH are mandatory.
